David, before we start, could you tell me what the goal of this call is?
Sure. The first item on the agenda is the rollout status.
Thanks. Do you know if the security approval is ready?
Not yet. I will raise it with their team this morning.
Got it. One more thing, can I ask who owns the user training?
That is on your side. Let me recap the action items at the end.

Hi Patrícia, this is David. Before our call tomorrow, I want to share the agenda. First, we will review the rollout status. Then, we will address the open security concern. Finally, we will confirm the priorities for next week. If anything is not clear, please raise it early. I always like to leave time for questions at the end, so feel free to ask me to clarify or recap any point. Talk soon.

Hi Patrícia, this is Priya. I listened to the recording, but I have a few questions before we sync. Could you tell me what the new deadline is? I also want to double-check who is responsible for the test environment. One more thing: I was wondering if the client has confirmed the training date. Please rephrase the last action item if you can, because I want to be sure I understood it. I will follow up with the details by email. Thank you.
